SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.mode

Class PlayerStats

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.model.mode.PlayerStats
public class PlayerStats extends Object
Player statistics tracker for two-player mode. Tracks lines cleared, attacks sent/received, combos, and detailed gameplay metrics.
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayerStats()
    Constructs a PlayerStats instance with initial values.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getAllClears()
    Gets the number of all clears.
    int
    getAttacksReceived()
    Gets the total number of attacks received.
    int
    getAttacksSent()
    Gets the total number of attacks sent.
    int
    getCurrentCombo()
    Gets the current combo streak.
    String
    getFormattedTime()
    Gets a formatted string representation of game time.
    long
    getGameTimeSeconds()
    Gets the game time in seconds.
    int
    getHardDrops()
    Gets the number of hard drops performed.
    int
    getLinesCleared()
    Gets the total number of lines cleared.
    double
    getLPM()
    Gets the lines cleared per minute (LPM) rate.
    int
    getMaxCombo()
    Gets the maximum combo achieved.
    int
    getSoftDrops()
    Gets the number of soft drops performed.
    int
    getTetrisCount()
    Gets the number of Tetris clears (4-line clears).
    void
    recordAllClear()
    Records an all clear (board completely cleared).
    void
    recordAttackReceived(int lines)
    Records an attack received from opponent.
    void

    Records a hard drop.
    void
    recordLineClear(int lines, int attackPower)
    Records a line clear event.
    void
    recordSoftDrop()
    Records a soft drop.
    void
    reset()
    Resets all statistics to initial values.
    void
    resetCombo()
    Resets the current combo streak.
    void
    startGameTime()
    Starts the game timer after countdown completes.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerStats

      public PlayerStats()
      Constructs a PlayerStats instance with initial values. All statistics are reset to zero.

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets all statistics to initial values. Note: gameStartTime should be set after countdown using startGameTime().

    • startGameTime

      public void startGameTime()
      Starts the game timer after countdown completes. Records the current system time as the game start time.

    • recordLineClear

      public void recordLineClear(int lines, int attackPower)
      Records a line clear event.
      Parameters:
      lines - the number of lines cleared
      attackPower - the attack power generated (lines sent to opponent)

    • recordAttackReceived

      public void recordAttackReceived(int lines)
      Records an attack received from opponent.
      Parameters:
      lines - the number of garbage lines received

    • recordHardDrop

      public void recordHardDrop()
      Records a hard drop.

    • recordSoftDrop

      public void recordSoftDrop()
      Records a soft drop.

    • recordAllClear

      public void recordAllClear()
      Records an all clear (board completely cleared).

    • resetCombo

      public void resetCombo()
      Resets the current combo streak.

    • getLinesCleared

      public int getLinesCleared()
      Gets the total number of lines cleared.
      Returns:
      lines cleared

    • getAttacksSent

      public int getAttacksSent()
      Gets the total number of attacks sent.
      Returns:
      attacks sent

    • getAttacksReceived

      public int getAttacksReceived()
      Gets the total number of attacks received.
      Returns:
      attacks received

    • getMaxCombo

      public int getMaxCombo()
      Gets the maximum combo achieved.
      Returns:
      maximum combo

    • getCurrentCombo

      public int getCurrentCombo()
      Gets the current combo streak.
      Returns:
      current combo

    • getGameTimeSeconds

      public long getGameTimeSeconds()
      Gets the game time in seconds.
      Returns:
      game time in seconds

    • getTetrisCount

      public int getTetrisCount()
      Gets the number of Tetris clears (4-line clears).
      Returns:
      Tetris count

    • getAllClears

      public int getAllClears()
      Gets the number of all clears.
      Returns:
      all clear count

    • getHardDrops

      public int getHardDrops()
      Gets the number of hard drops performed.
      Returns:
      hard drop count

    • getSoftDrops

      public int getSoftDrops()
      Gets the number of soft drops performed.
      Returns:
      soft drop count

    • getLPM

      public double getLPM()
      Gets the lines cleared per minute (LPM) rate.
      Returns:
      LPM rate, or 0 if game time is 0

    • getFormattedTime

      public String getFormattedTime()
      Gets a formatted string representation of game time.
      Returns:
      formatted time string (MM:SS)
